options.content: ## Relative Cost — Namespace Share of Cluster Resources
## Resource Waste — Which Pods Are Wasting Resources?
## Pod Anomaly — Which Pod Is Causing Issues?

targets.expr: avg by (exported_pod, exported_namespace, event_type, cluster) (topk(10, avg by (exported_pod, exported_namespace, event_type, cluster) (kubepocket_pod_event_count{exported_namespace=~"$namespace"})))
avg by (exported_pod, exported_namespace, event_type, cluster) (kubepocket_pod_event_count{event_type="CrashLoopBackOff", exported_namespace=~"$namespace"})

options.content: ## Real Usage vs Request — Overprovisioning Analysis (Metrics Server)

panels.title: 🖥️ Node Detail Table — click column header to sort
CPU — Allocatable vs Requested vs Actual (cores)
Memory — Allocatable vs Requested vs Actual (GiB)

targets.expr: avg by (pvc, namespace, cluster, storageclass) (count(kubepocket_pvc_bound) - sum(kubepocket_pvc_bound))

panels.title: 🚨 Active Alerts — Namespace & Severity Detail
panels.description: Alert counts by namespace+severity. For PVC capacity/unbound alert details: GET /api/alerts/
